creator: jaap@NLnetLabs.nl
text:
(In reply to Roman from comment #0)
The problem is not caused by the CONFLICTS statement. It does works properly at build time.

However, the pkg manager seems to ignore it when installing the package. 
This is apparently known bug in pkg, see the discussion at github: see <https://github.com/freebsd/pkg/issues/772>.

        jaap
